message:
refactor(connectors): fix opencode .db path inference, pi_agent indentation and session_dir hoisting

OpenCode connector:
- The data_dir→db candidate logic no longer gates the ".db extension"
  branch on .exists(), preventing a nonexistent user-supplied .db path
  from silently falling through to the directory join path and producing
  a nonsense /path/to/file.db/opencode.db candidate
- Added regression tests for direct .db file scan and nonexistent .db
  path handling

Pi Agent connector:
- Hoist sessions_dir computation out of the per-file loop so the
  filesystem stat runs once per home instead of once per session file
- Fix indentation of the entire per-file processing block (was one
  level too shallow after a prior refactor)
- Treat empty PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR override as unset to prevent scans
  from silently falling through to the process working directory

Cross-connector:
- Minor whitespace and formatting consistency fixes across claude_code,
  cline, codex, conformance_tests, factory, goose, hermes, and utils

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
